generated_at_note: Curated editorial dataset. Scores computed via the FoodGrump weighting model.

venues.name: Le Bernardin
venues.blurb: Elegant temple of seafood; one of NYC's most decorated fine-dining rooms.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Flawless seafood tasting menu, worth every penny.

venues.name: Eleven Madison Park
venues.blurb: Grand plant-based tasting menu inside a landmark Art Deco dining room.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Divisive since going vegan but the service is unreal.

venues.name: Per Se
venues.address: 10 Columbus Cir, 4th Fl, New York, NY
venues.blurb: Thomas Keller's refined tasting menu with sweeping Central Park views.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Classic Keller precision, the view seals it.

venues.name: Katz's Delicatessen
venues.address: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY
venues.blurb: Iconic 130-year-old deli famous for towering hand-carved pastrami on rye.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Touristy but the pastrami genuinely lives up to the hype.

venues.name: Peter Luger Steak House
venues.blurb: Cash-only Brooklyn institution serving dry-aged porterhouse since 1887.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Gruff service, but that porterhouse is legendary.

venues.name: Superiority Burger
venues.blurb: Cult veggie burger spot reborn as a lively all-day East Village diner.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Best veggie burger in the city, hands down.

venues.name: Xi'an Famous Foods
venues.blurb: Fiery hand-pulled biang biang noodles and cumin lamb burgers on the cheap.

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Torrisi
venues.blurb: Rich Italian-American cooking with a Chinatown accent in a handsome room.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Major's cooking is soulful and the vibe is perfect.

venues.name: Cosme
venues.blurb: Enrique Olvera's modern Mexican; the husk meringue is a NYC classic.

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Sushi Nakazawa
venues.blurb: Warm, generous omakase from a Jiro-trained chef in a cozy Village room.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Best value high-end omakase in the city.

venues.name: Roberta's
venues.blurb: Wood-fired pizza and a garden that helped define Bushwick dining.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: The Bee Sting pizza is worth the L train trek.

venues.name: Gramercy Tavern
venues.blurb: Danny Meyer's warm, seasonal American icon with a beloved walk-in tavern.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Timeless NYC dining, the tavern room is the move.

venues.name: The Mark Hotel
venues.blurb: Glamorous Upper East Side landmark with Jean-Georges dining and bold design.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Impeccable service, the Met is a block away.

venues.name: The Greenwich Hotel

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Aman New York

venues.name: 1 Hotel Brooklyn Bridge

venues.name: Benu

venues.blurb: Chef Maksut Askar reimagines Anatolian heritage recipes with Bosphorus views from SALT Galata.

venues.name: TURK Fatih Tutak
venues.blurb: Fatih Tutak's tasting-menu flagship, Istanbul's most decorated restaurant with two Michelin stars.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Ambitious tasting menu, the pinnacle of Turkish fine dining.

venues.name: Ciya Sofrasi
venues.blurb: Musa Dagdeviren's beloved canteen preserving forgotten Anatolian regional dishes.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: A living museum of Turkish home cooking, and cheap too.

venues.name: Karakoy Lokantasi

venues.blurb: Handsome tiled meyhane serving classic meze and seafood; a Karakoy institution.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Gorgeous room and reliably excellent meze.

venues.name: Hamdi Restaurant
venues.blurb: Famed Urfa-style kebab house with Golden Horn views over the Spice Bazaar.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: The pistachio kebab and the view make it a classic.

venues.name: Zubeyir Ocakbasi
venues.blurb: Smoky charcoal-grill ocakbasi where you watch skewers cooked over open flame.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Best kebabs in Beyoglu, grilled right in front of you.

venues.name: Balikci Sabahattin

venues.blurb: Long-running fish restaurant in a historic house serving classic Istanbul seafood meze.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Old-school seafood done properly near the old city.

venues.name: Asitane
venues.address: Kariye, Kariye Cami Sk. No:6, 34087 Edirnekapi

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Fascinating historic Ottoman dishes you can't find elsewhere.

venues.name: Dai Pera
venues.blurb: Cozy family kitchen turning out heartfelt Turkish home cooking and slow-cooked stews.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Feels like eating at a Turkish grandmother's table.

venues.name: Van Kahvalti Evi

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Nusr-Et Steakhouse Etiler

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Ciragan Palace Kempinski
venues.blurb: Restored Ottoman palace on the Bosphorus with an infinity pool over the water.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Staying in an actual sultan's palace on the Bosphorus.

venues.name: Four Seasons Hotel Istanbul at Sultanahmet
venues.blurb: A former neoclassical prison turned intimate luxury hotel steps from Hagia Sophia.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: Unbeatable location right by the Blue Mosque.

venues.name: The Peninsula Istanbul

venues.blurb: Waterfront newcomer in the Galataport complex with sweeping Bosphorus views.

recommendations.title: Reddit
recommendations.snippet: The most polished new luxury hotel in the city.

venues.name: Six Senses Kocatas Mansions

recommendations.title: Reddit

venues.name: Jay Fai

recommendations.snippet: Authentic old-recipe Thai with a green ethos.

venues.name: Botswana Butchery
